_instructions: Replace all placeholder values below with your real MercadoPago credentials. Get them at: https://www.mercadopago.com.ar/developers/panel

MercadoPago._AccessToken_note: Production Access Token from MP Developer Panel > Credentials > Production
MercadoPago._PublicKey_note: Production Public Key from MP Developer Panel > Credentials > Production
MercadoPago._WebhookSecret_note: Generated when you configure a webhook in MP Developer Panel > Webhooks
MercadoPago._NotificationUrl_note: Must be publicly accessible HTTPS URL. Register this in MP Developer Panel > Webhooks

_steps_to_go_live: 3. Create application -> get Production Access Token and Public Key
6. Copy WebhookSecret shown during webhook setup
7. Replace values in appsettings.json on the API server
8. Restart the Docker container: docker restart sportlife-api
